sentences.target: Décidément, tu arrives toujours en retard.

translations.fr: Décidément, tu arrives toujours en retard.
translations.de: Ganz ehrlich, du kommst immer zu spät.
translations.vi: Thật lòng, bạn lúc nào cũng đến muộn.
translations.nl: Eerlijk gezegd, je bent altijd te laat.
translations.hi: सच कहूँ तो, तुम हमेशा देर से आते हो.
translations.nb: Ærlig talt, du kommer alltid for sent.
translations.sv: Ärligt talat, du kommer alltid för sent.
translations.da: Ærligt talt, du kommer altid for sent.
translations.ja: 正直、あなたはいつも遅刻している。

tokens.explanation: Sentence/discourse adverb expressing the speaker's attitude or emphasis.
2nd-person singular subject personal pronoun.
Main verb; present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Frequency adverb modifying the verb.
Preposition; here part of the fixed expression “en retard” meaning “late.”
Common noun; in “en retard,” the expression means “to be late.”

sentences.target: Décidément, ce métro n'arrive jamais à l'heure.
sentences.reading: /desidemɑ̃ sə metʁo naʁiv ʒamɛ a lœʁ/

translations.fr: Décidément, ce métro n'arrive jamais à l'heure.
translations.ipa: /desidemɑ̃ sə metʁo naʁiv ʒamɛ a lœʁ/
translations.en: Clearly, this subway is never on time.
translations.es: Está claro que este metro nunca llega a tiempo.
translations.de: Ganz ehrlich, diese U-Bahn ist nie pünktlich.
translations.it: A quanto pare, questa metropolitana non è mai puntuale.
translations.ko: 확실히 이 지하철은 제시간에 오지 않아.
translations.zh-Hans: 说真的，这地铁从来不准时。
translations.yue: 講真，呢班地鐵從來都唔準時。
translations.ru: Честно говоря, это метро никогда не ходит вовремя.
translations.pt: Sinceramente, este metro nunca chega a horas.
translations.he: ברור שהרכבת התחתית הזאת אף פעם לא מגיעה בזמן.
translations.tr: Açıkçası, bu metro asla vaktinde gelmiyor.
translations.vi: Rõ ràng là tàu điện ngầm này không bao giờ đúng giờ.
translations.ar: واضح أن هذا المترو لا يصل في الوقت أبداً.
translations.nl: Eerlijk gezegd is deze metro nooit op tijd.
translations.uk: Чесно кажучи, це метро ніколи не ходить вчасно.
translations.hu: Őszintén szólva, ez a metró soha nem érkezik időben.
translations.hi: साफ़ है, यह मेट्रो कभी समय पर नहीं आती.
translations.pl: Szczerze mówiąc, to metro nigdy nie przyjeżdża na czas.
translations.el: Ειλικρινά, αυτό το μετρό δεν είναι ποτέ στην ώρα του.
translations.nb: Ærlig talt, denne T-banen er aldri i rute.
translations.id: Terus terang, kereta bawah tanah ini tidak pernah tepat waktu.
translations.sv: Ärligt talat, den här tunnelbanan är aldrig i tid.
translations.ro: Sincer, metroul ăsta nu este niciodată la timp.
translations.cs: Upřímně, tohle metro nikdy nejezdí včas.
translations.da: Ærligt talt, metroen kommer aldrig til tiden.
translations.fi: Rehellisesti sanottuna, tämä metro ei ole koskaan ajoissa.
translations.ja: 正直、この地下鉄は時間どおりに来ることがない。

tokens.explanation: Sentence/discourse adverb adding speaker’s comment.
Demonstrative determiner modifying “métro.”
Common noun; head of the subject NP.
Clitic negation particle; pairs with a negative adverb (here “jamais”).
Main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular, agreeing with “métro.”
Negative adverb; with “ne” forms clausal negation (“never”).
Preposition introducing the time expression.
Elided definite article before a vowel-initial noun.
Common noun; in the idiom “à l’heure” meaning “on time.”

translations.en: Clearly, my umbrella is leaking again.
translations.es: Por lo visto, mi paraguas vuelve a gotear.
translations.de: Offenbar tropft mein Regenschirm schon wieder.
translations.it: A quanto pare, il mio ombrello perde di nuovo.
translations.zh-Hans: 看样子，我的雨伞又漏了。
translations.pt: Pelo visto, meu guarda-chuva está pingando de novo.
translations.vi: Có vẻ như chiếc ô của tôi lại bị dột.
translations.ar: يبدو أن مظلتي تتسرب مرة أخرى.
translations.hu: Úgy tűnik, megint beázik az esernyőm.
translations.hi: लगता है, मेरी छतरी फिर से टपक रही है.
translations.pl: Wygląda na to, że mój parasol znowu przecieka.
translations.el: Φαίνεται πως η ομπρέλα μου ξαναστάζει.
translations.ro: Se pare că umbrela mea iar picură.
translations.da: Det lader til, at min paraply lækker igen.
translations.ja: どうやら、また傘から水が漏れている。

tokens.explanation: Sentence/discourse adverb expressing stance.
Possessive determiner; masculine singular, agrees with “parapluie.”
Common noun; subject of the clause.
Main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular. Here ‘fuir’ means ‘to leak.’
Adverb indicating repetition or continuation.

sentences.target: Décidément, on ne s'entend pas aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Décidément, on ne s'entend pas aujourd'hui.
translations.en: Clearly, we’re not getting along today.
translations.es: Está claro que hoy no nos estamos llevando bien.
translations.de: Offenbar sind wir heute nicht auf einer Wellenlänge.
translations.it: A quanto pare, oggi non andiamo d'accordo.
translations.ko: 확실히 오늘은 우리가 영 안 맞네.
translations.zh-Hans: 看来，我们今天不太合得来。
translations.pt: Pelo visto, hoje a gente não está se dando bem.
translations.vi: Có vẻ như hôm nay chúng ta không hợp nhau lắm.
translations.nl: Blijkbaar kunnen we het heute niet goed met elkaar vinden.
translations.hu: Úgy tűnik, ma nem jövünk ki egymással.
translations.hi: लगता है, आज हमारी बन नहीं रही है.
translations.pl: Wygląda na to, że dziś się nie dogadujemy.
translations.el: Φαίνεται πως σήμερα δεν τα βρίσκουμε.
translations.nb: Det virker som om vi ikke kommer overens i dag.
translations.id: Sepertinya hari ini kita tidak akur.
translations.sv: Det verkar som att vi inte kommer överens i dag.
translations.ro: Se pare că azi nu ne înțelegem.
translations.cs: Zdá se, že si dnes nerozumíme.
translations.da: Det virker som om vi ikke rigtig kommer overens i dag.
translations.fi: Näyttää siltä, että emme tänään tule toimeen.
translations.ja: どうやら今日はうまく噛み合っていないね。

tokens.explanation: Sentence/discourse adverb adding speaker’s comment.
Indefinite subject pronoun; commonly used for ‘we’ in spoken French.
Negation particle; first part of standard negation with “pas.”
Reflexive clitic pronoun; elided before a vowel, marking pronominal verb ‘s’entendre.’
Main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular. With reflexive ‘se,’ means ‘to get along’ or ‘to agree.’
Negative adverb; completes the standard negation with “ne.”
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the action.

jp: Décidément, tu arrives toujours en retard.
Décidément, ce métro n'arrive jamais à l'heure.
Décidément, on ne s'entend pas aujourd'hui.
fu: /desidemɑ̃ sə metʁo naʁiv ʒamɛ a lœʁ/

ipa: /desidemɑ̃ sə metʁo naʁiv ʒamɛ a lœʁ/
en: Clearly, this subway is never on time.
Clearly, my umbrella is leaking again.
Clearly, we’re not getting along today.
